name: Ty4_LTR_family
description: Ty4 retrotransposon family in S. cerevisiae. 6.2 kb element with 371 bp 'tau' LTRs. S288C carries 3 full-length Ty4 plus ~20 solo tau LTRs. Like Ty1/2/3, biased to upstream of Pol III genes.

architecture.internal_structure: 5'LTR (371 bp) - gag-pol ORFs - 3'LTR; solo LTRs are recombination products of intra-element exchange

expected_copy_count: ~3 full-length elements + ~20 solo LTRs per haploid S288C genome; strain-variable
